entry.title: The 'or' operation is not working across different property names when using substringof
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently working with an OData service and have encountered a limitation that I'm hoping to get some help with.

Here's the context: I'm using the following OData query to filter data based on specific conditions:

$filter=substringof('stann', Email) or substringof('stann', FormattedName)&$format=json

it seems like the or operation is not working across different property names when using substringof. Has anyone experienced a similar issue, and if so, were you able to find a workaround or fix? Is there a specific syntax or method in OData that I might be missing?

The Error I'm receiving is

"error": {
        "code": "ERROR",
        "message": {
            "lang": "en",
            "value": "Error in filter System Query, Operation failed::Operands of logical operator '' are not valid"
        }
    }

entry.title: RAP Odata V4 APIs from S4HANA public cloud not visible in BAS
entry.content:
I have created a RAP Application in S4HANA Public cloud using ADT. I have expodes this application as an OData V4 UI service. The preview of the application works fine.

I created a BTP destination for the S4HANA Public Cloud dev system (client 080).
The destination properties have WebIDEEnabled = true and WebIDEUsage = odata_abap,dev_abap,odata_gen

In SAP Business Application Studio, when I create a Fiori List Report using Template and choose the S4HANA public cloud destination, I am unable to find my Odata V4 service.I can see only OData V2 services.

I could not find much hints in SAP community blogs except that in few blogs they have mentioned settings w.r.t /IWFND/CONFIG and other V4 service group nodes but then all of these are On Premise related.

Is there a restriction on the availability of OData V4 Service in BAS? Or am I missing any configuration.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Application Generator: How to connect to a bearer authenticated OData Service?
entry.content:
I have been experimenting with generating applications using the SAP Fiori Application Generator npm extension. I do not face any issue connecting to my locally run mock OData service during step 2: connect to a data source, which does not require any authentication.

However, the extension only seems to support connecting to an OData service that has been set up with basic authentication (i.e. requires a username and password). However, my live OData service has been set up with bearer authentication.

I have the following questions:

  1. How can I connect to my bearer authenticated OData service using the SAP Fiori Application Generator extension?
  2. If this isn't possible, how can I manually set up my app to support this?

entry.title: Creating operations are disabled for entity '$AE_UIX#SRVD#ZSD_WTY_CLAIM~ZWTY_CLAIM_CUSTOM_ENTIT'
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to make a POST OData call in the Gateway client, but I am encountering the following error:

"Creating operations are disabled for entity '$AE_UIX#SRVD#ZSD_WTY_CLAIM~ZWTY_CLAIM_CUSTOM_ENTITY'."

We have created a wrapper class that calls the BAPI `BAPI_WARRANTYCLAIM_CREATE`. Additionally, we have developed an OData service using RAP.

Could you please help me understand how to resolve this issue?

Thank you!

entry.title: Public Dimension Table Import Job Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone
Since Sunday, we have been receiving an error in our oData Import Jobs that update the Data Access Control in the Public Dimension Table as 'An unexpected error occurred while trying to update the dimension data.' Could this be related to the SAC 2024 Q4 update? Does anyone have any information?
Thank you in advance

entry.title: In Fiori Element Screen CREATE operation of child entities is not working
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have created a Fiori element screen for our API. So earlier everything was working fine. But a couple of days ago, we observed that the CREATE operation of child entities was not working. CREATE is visible on screen, so while clicking on CREATE nothing is happening, and there are no call logs under the network tab of the developers tool while clicking on CREATE. And also, we don't have any recent code changes. We have implemented Draft with early numbering and its type of unmanaged implementation. How It is not working all of sudden. Does anyone face this issue, or can someone help with this issue??

 

And in console while loading the screen, I am getting the below errors.

 

Thank You

entry.title: how to Get logged in User details in custom SAP FIORI from ECC
entry.content:
I am working on retrieving user details in my Fiori app. The backend system is ECC 6.0, and I am using OData for communication.

any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: $batch process to delete single or multiple Vendor from BusinessPartner number
entry.content:
Hey.

Here I try to delete a Vendor from BusinessPartner number - '101127'. I am using the $batch process to delete the Vendor but don't know it throw error as - Batch request payload is invalid.

Please help me to resolve this. here I attach a screenshot for the reference.

Please tell me the step by step process that what changes I have to make to correct this.
Thanks in advance.


OData  SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: Fiori Elements odata V4 List Report missing option to select all columns
entry.content:
Dear community,

we noticed that in Fiori Elements List Reports built with oData V4 - both standard and custom ones, the option to "select all" columns in the table view setting dialog is missing (replaced by de-select all). Is it possible to adjust this either by any manifest settings or annotations? I couldn't find any resource for this.

In oData V2 List Report the "select all" checkbox is available in the view settings dialog.

entry.title: Post request to /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product is returning XML instead of JSON
entry.content:
Hi community!

I'm using the API /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product to create products via Http call. According to the API documentation (https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_PRODUCT_SRV_0001/path/post_A_Product), the content of the response should be a JSON object in both success and error case scenarios, but I'm getting an XML response content.

I'm sending a JSON object in my request body and setting the content type header as "application/json". I have been able to successfully create products by sending POST requests to this end-point but I'm still receiving an XML object in the response content.

If I add the query parameter "$format=json" to my request URL, I get a Bad Request response saying that my request contains invalid parameters, but this time the response content is a JSON object.

What should I do in order to get a JSON response as described in the documentation.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Create _CDS API service with ABAP coding.
entry.content:
Hello,
i have a task for creation of a new OData API.
I would like to use a simple CDS view with @odata.publish: true
and to reuse an existing custom logic which has been written in ABAP.
Is that approach possible at all?

*details:
When the service is generated there is customizing created which referes to a Data Provider Class : CL_SADL_GTK_EXPOSURE_DPC. However i can not find a way to change this customization and to set up a new Z class here and furthermore the class CL_SADL_GTK_EXPOSURE_DPC is a final class.

Maybe the only possibility is to reuse this new CDS in SEGW ?

Thanks,
Rosen

entry.title: Collection of String in deep entity model
entry.content:
I am Working on a Deep Entity post odata request I am facing a challenge while adding multivalue-array in properties.
my JSON format is quit complex :

{

    "tourUpdateEventType": "FROZEN",

    "tourDetail": {

        "tourId": "",

        "transporterId": "",

        "transporterName": "Default transporter",

        "vehicleModelId": "",

        "vehicleModelName": "SUZUKI",

        "vehicleId": "",

        "tourStartTime": "",

        "tourEndTime": "",

        "tourTravelDistance": 5955,

        "isSortedForTour": false,

        "isMultiTrip": false

    },

    "orders": [

        {

            "id": "",

            "sourceOrderId": "",

            "type": "DROP",

            "date": "2024-11-07",

            "slot": {

                "start": "2024-11-07T02:00:00.000+0000",

                "end": "2024-11-07T17:00:00.000+0000"

            },

            "channel": "DISPATCH_IQ",

            "orderStatus": "PLANNED",

            "actor": {

                "id": "mara/personnel/rupsinghg"

            },

            "triggerTime": "2024-11-07T11:06:19.074+0000",

            "lineItems": [],

            "lineItemTransactionStatuses": [],

            "teamId": "1012-KS1",

            "quantities": [],

            "homebaseId": "1012",

            "homebaseEta": "2024-11-07T05:02:00.000+0000",

            "homebaseCompleteOtp": "5544",

            "customerCompleteOtp": "1868",

            "cancellationOtp": "1868",

            "customerReturnOtp": "6412",

            "locationId": "1012-KS1-01-0004300012",

            "planIteration": 1,

            "tourDetail": {

                "sequence": 1,

                "isSortedForTour": false

            },

            "initialEta": "2024-11-07T05:11:22.000+0000",

            "initialEtd": "2024-11-07T05:19:22.000+0000",

            "orchestrationMetadata": {

                "waybills": []

            },

            "amountTransaction": {

                "refId": "40e649bef5374ebb87c432c658a50ad5",

                "amount": {

                    "amount": 3,

                    "currency": "PKR"

                },

                "exchangeType": "NONE"

            }

        }

    ],

    "timestamp": "2024-11-07T11:06:23.338+0000"

}
facing problem in :

"lineItems": [], "lineItemTransactionStatuses": [], kindly help

entry.title: Edmx file fails as it does not have DOCTYPE
entry.content:
Hello,

We generated ODATA v2 client for few services using this guide:
https://sap.github.io/cloud-sdk/docs/java/features/odata/vdm-generator

We use MAven depencencies and Maven plugin to generate neede classes. Nevertheless, when I build our project I've got warning and errors like:
Warning: validation was turned on but an org.xml.sax.ErrorHandler was not set, which is probably not what is desired. Parser will use a default ErrorHandler to print the first 0 errors. Please call the setErrorHandler method to fix this.
Error: URI=file:/C:/Repository/planner/integrator/S4Hana/edmx/API_CLFN_PRODUCT_SRV.xml Line=2: Document root element "edmx:Edmx", must match DOCTYPE root "null".
Error: URI=file:/C:/Repository/planner/integrator/S4Hana/edmx/API_CLFN_PRODUCT_SRV.xml Line=2: Document is invalid: no grammar found.

Same errors happened for all our edmx files. 

How could we avoid it? We would prefer to disable that default validator or use that one which understand edmx, but we did not found such option in Maven plugin.

Code part from our MAven plugin is:

<plugin>
    <groupId>com.sap.cloud.sdk.datamodel</groupId>
    <artifactId>odata-generator-maven-plugin</artifactId>
    <version>${sap.cloud.version}</version>
    <executions>
        <execution>
            <id>generate-consumption</id>
            <phase>generate-sources</phase>
            <goals>
                <goal>generate</goal>
            </goals>
            <configuration>
                <inputDirectory>${project.basedir}/edmx</inputDirectory>
                <outputDirectory>${sap.vdm.generated.folder}</outputDirectory>
                <deleteOutputDirectory>false</deleteOutputDirectory>
                <overwriteFiles>true</overwriteFiles>
                <packageName>com.delfoi.planner.integrator.customer.s4hana.s4hana.vdm</packageName>
                <compileScope>COMPILE</compileScope>
                <serviceMethodsPerEntitySet>true</serviceMethodsPerEntitySet>
            </configuration>
        </execution>
    </executions>
</plugin>

Where

<sap.cloud.version>5.14.0</sap.cloud.version>

PS: Also I found that in this tag only last link is actually accessible. First two links are "The resource you are looking for has been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable."


<edmx:Edmx Version="1.0"
xmlns:edmx="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/06/edmx"
xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata"
xmlns:sap="http://www.sap.com/Protocols/SAPData">

entry.title: ODATA loading only column headers no data
entry.content:
When using copy link for ODATA services I get the link below:

https://businessobjects4/biprws/raylight/v1/documents/cuid_AVBh0PdouLNDu1jJ7iJnMmo/datamodel/data.svc/re_3409586-3409591

When adding the above to excel get the column headers but no data from the report is loaded.  When using a sample Webi report it works fine.

Using Excel for MS 365

entry.title: How to Edit Multiple Selected Items Individually in a List Report Using an Action Button?
entry.content:
I have a List Report in my SAP Fiori Elements application, and I want to allow the user to select multiple lines and then click on an action button to edit each line individually.

Currently, my action button accepts a parameter where I can pass a single value. However, this value is static, meaning it applies the same value to all selected items, which doesn't allow flexibility for individual changes.

What I'm trying to achieve is the ability to dynamically pass different values (e.g., a unique part number) for each selected row when the button is clicked. I would like to know how I can flexibly manage dialog parameters for each selected item, or if there's a better approach to achieve this functionality in the context of a List Report with SAP RAP.

Has anyone implemented something similar or can suggest a solution for this scenario?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: An error occurred while communicating with the OData server to retrieve metadata.
entry.content:
Hello, Specialist!

After creating the application in the program /MERP/CORE_CPMS_APPCREATE_PROG, we encountered the following issue:

When accessing the application via QR code, it returns a persona error with the following log message:
"Error caused by: [-100010] Retrieve metadata failed because the OData server returned HTTP code 403, with message: Access denied to system xxxxx. In case this was a valid request, ensure to expose the system correctly in your cloud connector."

Additionally, some other errors were observed. We are currently using version 2205, which was configured in Syclo; however, the application seems to be pulling information from version 2405.

Thank you in advance for your support

entry.title: SAP BYD OutboundDelivery by OData API missing Notes
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to extract OutboundDelivery data by OData API and use something like khoutbounddelivery from the GitHub examples. I struggle with the Notes (like Internal Comment, Customer Information ...) though. I tried to use the TextCollection (similar to the example in khpurchaseorder - which works) but only get empty arrays.

Am I missing something here? Do I need a different BO?

Thank you.

entry.title: Base64 String Issues When Posting Attachments via ODataV2 API
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on uploading attachments to supplier invoices in SAP using the API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV via SAP CPI (Cloud Platform Integration). While I successfully upload the file to SAP, I encounter an issue when attempting to open it—it appears to be corrupted. I suspect that the problem lies within the payload I am sending, specifically in how the file content is being handled.

Here is the JSON body payload I am using:

 

{
 "AttachmentContent":
  {
    "MimeType": "application/pdf",
    "Content": base64
 }
}

 



How I Generate the base64 File Content in Javascript:

 

async function fileToBase64(filePath) {
    return await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
       fs.readFile(filePath, (err, data) => {
           if (err) {
               reject(`Error reading file: ${err.message}`);
           } else {
               var base64 = data.toString('base64');
               resolve(base64);
           }
       });
   });
}

 


The upload to SAP completes without errors.
When attempting to open the file in SAP, it fails, indicating that the file is corrupted or invalid.

Since the OData receiver in CPI only accepts XML payloads, I use a JSON-to-XML converter. The generated XML looks like this:(deletet the base64 string because it is too long anyway)

 

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> 
<AttachmentContentSet> 
<AttachmentContent> 
<MimeType>application/pdf</MimeType> 
<Content>Base64String</Content> 
</AttachmentContent> 
</AttachmentContentSet>

 

 I would greatly appreciate guidance on this topic.

 Thank you for your help and insights!

entry.title: Metadata not updating after change in behavior projection extension
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on an extension for the Manage Sales Order Version 2 (F3893). I have added an action to an extension of the SalesOrderItem entity behavior and the metadata extension (the button itself). Now I would like to remove an action (I added a second one for testing purposes). I've removed it from the behavior extension and from the metadata extension. Now when I navigate to the item page I get the error "Property <my action name> not found". I've checked the metadata from the browser and the action still appears there. I checked the metadata at the /IWFND/V4_ADMIN transaction and the action does not appear in the metadata that I view from there. I will write a comment with the various things I've tried.

All the best,

Ben

entry.title: ONB -> EC MDF Object Integration, what happens when EC MDF object has a parent-child relationship?
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

After following some blogs from the community, trying to collect data with MDF Objects in the Additional Data Collection Step in Onboarding and pass it to the MDF Objects from EC, we realized that when the Employee Central MDF Object has a parent-child relationship, the solution provided in these blogs doesn´t work. 

Does anyone know if it is also possible to use the Integration Center when the objects in EC have this kind of relationship or the solution provided by these blogs is just applicable when the destination MDF in EC are individual. If it is possible then, what are we missing?

If not, what could we do to workaround this limitation?

Here are the blogs mentioned in this post:

 ONB-EC Integration: Sending data from Custom Data ... - SAP Community

Collecting Vaccine Data from Onboardee with SAP Su... - SAP Community

 

Thank you so much for sharing you´re knowledge. 

 

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Employee Profile SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding OData SAP SuccessFactors HCM Core
